rules_text:
alert ip $HOME_NET any -> 198.51.100.0/24 any (msg:"SNG THREATINTEL DOS destination address"; classtype:denial-of-service; sid:3200000000; rev:1; metadata:sng_threatintel cidr, sng_source cert, sng_confidence high;)
alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"SNG THREATINTEL MALWARE dns query"; dns.query; content:"malware-drop.example"; nocase; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:3200000001; rev:1; metadata:sng_threatintel domain, sng_source abuse.ch, sng_confidence high;)
alert ip $HOME_NET any -> 203.0.113.10 any (msg:"SNG THREATINTEL EXFIL destination address"; sid:3200000002; rev:1; metadata:sng_threatintel ip, sng_source feodo, sng_confidence high;)
alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"SNG THREATINTEL C2 ja3 client fingerprint"; ja3.hash; content:"e7d705a3286e19ea42f587b344ee6865"; classtype:command-and-control; sid:3200000003; rev:1; metadata:sng_threatintel ja3, sng_source otx, sng_confidence high;)
